meaning: adj.含糊的,不清楚的,茫然的,暧昧的
examples: The charges were vague and imprecise.
The phrasing of the question was vague.
Their own product literature makes only vague and unactionable statements about xanthones having antioxidant properties.
American jurisprudence defines puffery as vague expressions of corporate optimism and expectations about prospects.
